channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: NACC Staff Reactions to Leadership Criticism and Government Response Gaps
item.description: The article reveals internal NACC staff emails showing their reactions to an investigative piece highlighting the commission's leadership failures and lack of accountability. Outgoing Commissioner Pau...

item.title: Jeff Bezos's Shift in Allegiance: From Defiance to Support of Trump's Administration
item.description: The article examines Jeff Bezos's transformation from a vocal critic of Donald Trump to a prominent supporter of his administration. Initially, Bezos opposed Trump's policies, publicly criticized his ...

item.title: Canada Strengthens NATO Commitments Through Submarine Procurement Amid U.S. Uncertainty
item.description: Canada's finance minister, Chrystia Freeland (Carney), is navigating complex geopolitical and economic challenges as the country seeks to bolster its defense capabilities amid heightened tensions with...

item.title: Evo Lounge Closes After Three Years, Fans React with Mixed Feelings
item.description: The iconic Rongai nightclub Evo Lounge has officially shut down after three years of operation, marking the end of an era for Nairobi's nightlife scene. The club, which was a popular spot for music lo...

item.title: Cross River State Launches Seven-Year Coffee Development Plan to Diversify Economy
item.description: The Cross River State Government has launched a seven-year coffee development plan aimed at boosting the economy, creating jobs, and diversifying income sources. The initiative, called the 'Coffee Rev...

item.title: Tanzania Raises Central Bank Rate to 6.25% for Q3 2026, GDP Growth at 6% in H1 2026
item.description: The Bank of Tanzania (BOT) raised the Central Bank Rate (CBR) from 5.75% to 6.25% for Q3 2026 to combat inflation driven by global energy, fertilizer, and transportation costs linked to Middle East ge...

item.title: Sara Duterte's Impeachment Trial: Defense Fails to Prove Innocence
item.description: The House prosecution panel, led by Rep. Renee Co, stated that Vice President Sara Duterte's defense team did not categorically assert her innocence during the impeachment trial. Co emphasized that th...

item.title: Security challenges in Syria amid explosions during Macron's visit
item.description: Two bombs exploded near the hotel in Damascus where French President Emmanuel Macron held meetings, according to Syrian state media. The blasts occurred in a busy area between the Syrian tourism minis...

item.title: Nashville's Tornado Threat Shifts: Local Volunteers Play Key Role in Community Safety
item.description: The article explores how the pattern of tornadoes in Nashville, Tennessee, is evolving, placing more families at risk. A volunteer-run service called Nashville Severe Weather has emerged as a critical...

item.title: Canada selects Germany for submarine procurement, boosting economy and jobs
item.description: Canada has entered negotiations to purchase up to 12 submarines from German shipbuilder ThyssenKrupp Marine Systems (TKMS), marking a significant defense procurement deal. The agreement, which include...

item.title: Baltonado and Gomez excel in National Sporting Clays Championship
item.description: Carlo Baltonado and Richard Gomez emerged as standout performers in the recent National Sporting Clays Championship, showcasing their exceptional skills in precision shooting. The event, held at a pre...

item.title: Iyanii Engages Students at Kabare Girls High School to Promote Positive Change
item.description: Popular musician Iyanii recently visited Kabare Girls High School in Kirinyaga County, where he entertained students with an energetic performance during the school's cultural day. This visit is part ...

item.title: Belgium Defeats USA 4-1, Ends Hosts' World Cup Run in Seattle
item.description: The United States' World Cup campaign ended abruptly after a 4-1 defeat to Belgium in the Round of 16, marking an early exit for the co-hosts. Despite a strong group stage performance and a convincing...

item.title: Government Adds Three Major Airports to Privatisation Plan
item.description: The federal government has incorporated Pakistan's three largest international airports—Jinnah International Airport Karachi, Islamabad International Airport, and Allama Iqbal International Airport La...

item.title: Police Officer Linked to R50m Tender and R280m Contract Corruption Scandal
item.description: The Madlanga commission has revealed evidence linking Maj-Gen Feroz Khan, head of police crime intelligence, to a R280m National Treasury contract and a R50m tender for automotive spare parts. WhatsAp...

item.title: Woman Injured by Lime Bike Rider Faces Compensation Denial
item.description: Jane Ouartsi, a 60-something woman, suffered life-altering injuries after being struck by a child riding a Lime electric bike in central London. The collision left her with fractured bones, spinal dam...

item.title: AI boosts ASX earnings forecasts as corporate profits surge
item.description: Artificial intelligence is driving a significant increase in earnings forecasts for Australian Securities Exchange (ASX) companies, according to Macquarie analysts. The bank reports that AI-related co...

item.title: Australian PM Issues Apology After Controversial Comments on Kylie Minogue
item.description: Australian Prime Minister Anthony Albanese faced widespread criticism after making a controversial remark about singer Kylie Minogue during a comedy podcast interview. The incident occurred when host ...

item.title: Kenya Police Heighten Security Around Parliament Ahead of Saba Saba Protests
item.description: Police in Kenya have sealed off Parliament and tightened security across Nairobi's Central Business District ahead of planned Saba Saba demonstrations. The operation involves enhanced checkpoints, ant...

item.title: Trump's NATO Summit Amid Tensions and Ukraine Conflict
item.description: President Donald Trump is en route to Ankara, Turkey, for the NATO summit amid heightened tensions with the alliance. The summit occurs against the backdrop of Russia's ongoing war in Ukraine and rece...
